personalInfo.name: Azizul Haque Noman
personalInfo.title: Aspiring AI/ML Engineer
personalInfo.subtitle: Building intelligent systems through AI/ML and scalable backend development.
personalInfo.bio: I am a Computer Science student passionate about Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. I focus on building intelligent systems and scalable backend applications. My interests include image processing, NLP, and large language models. I continuously improve my skills through hands-on projects, research, and practical implementation.

projects.title: DirectEdge
projects.description: DirectEdge is a web-based supply chain management system that connects warehouses, agents, and retail shop owners. It enables inventory tracking, order processing, and stock distribution through role-based access, helping manage warehouse capacity, product inventory, and order lifecycle while reducing intermediaries and operational costs.
projects.subtitle: A Warehouse & Supply Chain Management System

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: A collaborative task management application with real-time updates, drag & drop, and team features.

projects.title: Weather Dashboard
projects.description: A beautiful weather dashboard showing current conditions, forecasts, and historical data with interactive charts.

experience.description: Leading the frontend team in building scalable web applications. Implemented CI/CD pipelines and improved performance by 40%.
Built and maintained multiple client-facing applications. Collaborated with design team to deliver pixel-perfect UIs.

education.degree: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering
education.description: Currently pursuing a Bachelor of Science in Computer Science and Engineering, building strong foundations in software development, algorithms, and system design with a focus on AI/ML and backend technologies.
